calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Goal-pipeline developmental-window 4-arm dissociation (drive vs hazard vs writer-freeze; first dACC enabled in lineage)
items.note: Follow-up to failure_autopsy V3-EXQ-622 2026-06-01T07:55Z. Pre-registered design at REE_assembly/evidence/planning/goal_pipeline_developmental_window_diagnostic_memo_2026-06-01.md (REE_assembly master 12d2a48310). 4-arm dissociation on scaffolded_sd054_onboarding substrate isolating the load-bearing axis behind V3-EXQ-622 S1+ z_goal collapse: ARM_A_FORMATION_ONLY (regression guard on 622 S0 PASS; drive_floor=0.9 + HFA=0.0 throughout) / ARM_B_DRIVE_ANNEAL_ONLY (drive_floor 0.9->0.2 anneal during P1, NO hazard; H1 drive-axis isolation) / ARM_C_HAZARD_ONLY (drive_floor=0.9 constant, HFA 0.0->0.7 anneal; hazard-axis isolation) / ARM_D_WRITER_FROZEN_DURING_TRANSITION (freeze use_mech295 + use_mech307 during P1 while annealing BOTH drive AND hazard; Option-A test). use_dacc=True with dacc_weight=0.5/dacc_interaction_weight=0.5 enabled on ALL arms -- FIRST time in this lineage (V3-EXQ-621a + V3-EXQ-622 both had dACC unconfigured, making dacc_bias_nonzero=0 in both manifests a measurement-OFF artefact NOT a substrate failure). 5 pre-registered acceptance criteria C1-C5 (verbatim from memo Section 3): C1 ARM_A z_goal_median >= 0.05 on >=2/3 seeds (regression guard); C2 ARM_B z_goal_median < 0.05 AND ARM_B P1-end < 0.5 * ARM_A (drive-axis); C3 ARM_C z_goal_median < 0.05 (hazard-axis); C4 ARM_D z_goal_median at P2 START >= 0.5 * ARM_A (writer-freeze rescue); C5 highest-z_goal arm's dacc_bias_nonzero >= 1.0/ep on >=2/3 seeds (consumer readout under non-trivial z_goal). Overall PASS = C1 AND (C2 OR C3 OR C4) AND C5. 4-row interpretation grid in script docstring: PASS_C2/FAIL_C3/PASS_C5 -> /implement-substrate AMEND scaffolded_sd054_onboarding (sustained-drive EMA at low drive_floor); FAIL_C2/PASS_C3/PASS_C5 -> AMEND with risk introduction decoupled in time; PASS_C2_C3_C4 -> AMEND adding writer-freeze P1 sub-phase (Option-A confirmed); FAIL_C5 -> /failure-autopsy on dACC readout chain. claim_ids=[] (substrate-readiness diagnostic; same epistemic class as 621a + 622; NOT load-bearing evidence weighting per CLAIM_IDS Accuracy Rule). experiment_purpose=diagnostic. supersedes=null (new question, new EXQ number). 4 arms x 3 seeds x P0(30 ep) + P1(30 ep) + P2(30 ep), 200 steps/ep. ARM_D writer-freeze test is a V3-conservative approximation of the long-horizon ACh/PV/BDNF plasticity-window territory (docs/thoughts/2026-06-01_plasticity_window_neuromodulators.md); ARM_D PASS authorises substrate amend on scaffolded_sd054_onboarding only, NOT V4-scope substrate cluster. Dry-run smoke PASS 2026-06-01T08:35Z (12 cells run end-to-end without crash; progress instrumentation correct; validate_experiments AST OK; emit_outcome sentinel wired). HAZARD NOTED (V3-EXQ-603d incident 2026-06-01T06:46Z): phase3-queue sync_daemon snapshot writer can drop pathspec-staged files between git-add and git-commit; post-commit dropped-file check verifies V3-EXQ-626 lands cleanly. Concurrent active siblings at queue time: IGW-027 MECH-262 (foreign untracked experiments/v3_exq_598c_*.py; pathspec-limited git add avoids sweep).

items.title: MECH-090 R-c readiness conjunction (4-arm, C1 baseline redesigned)
items.notes: Supersedes V3-EXQ-592d (FAIL non_contributory 2026-06-01 per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-592d_2026-06-01). 592d C1 baseline predicate (commit_rate = n_commit_entries / total_p2_steps > 0.001) was structurally unmeetable under rv-only ARM_0 entry semantic. 592e applies BOTH autopsy Section 9 fixes orthogonally: (a) FORCE_UNCOMMITTED_P2_ENTRY=True per-episode release of beta_gate + null e3._committed_trajectory + zero _committed_step_idx at P2 episode start so the gate is consulted on every fresh re-elevation; (b) HOLD_RATE_BASED acceptance criteria replacing the unmeasurable commit-rate predicate. Interpretation grid updated: C1 FAIL now routes to /diagnose-errors for SCRIPT predicate correction (NOT curriculum harness, NOT gate -- the 592d grid routing was INVERTED per user gate 2026-06-01T05:55Z). 4 arms x 3 seeds; PASS unblocks commitment_closure:GAP-4 -> done substrate-side. claim_ids=[MECH-090] only per CLAUDE.md claim_ids Accuracy Rule. Cross-link IGW-20260531-021. Dry-run smoke PASS 2026-06-01T06:38Z (wiring + force-uncommitted per-episode + C1 redesign all verified end-to-end).

items.title: MECH-104 volatility interrupt discriminative pair (signal + behaviour)
items.notes: EXP-0078 (EVB-0062) -- MECH-104 LC-NE volatility interrupt discriminative support-vs-ablation pair extending V3-EXQ-126 (PASS 6/6 2026-04-21, signal-magnitude only). NEW EXQ NUMBER (not letter) per CLAUDE.md versioning policy: this experiment adds the load-bearing 'enables de-commitment' behavioural-consequence half of MECH-104 that V3-EXQ-126 did not test, and the substrate has materially changed since 2026-04-21 (MECH-090 R-c readiness conjunction landed 2026-05-28/05-29). MECH-090 R-c gates intentionally LEFT OFF (use_mech090_readiness_conjunction=False, use_commit_readiness_gate=False) to isolate the volatility-interrupt mechanism cleanly. Design: SURPRISE_GATE_ON vs SURPRISE_GATE_ABLATED x matched seeds [42, 123] on the SAME trained agent + SAME eval env sequence. Measures both: (a) signal magnitude (delta_var_unexpected, delta_var_expected) and (b) behavioural consequence (per-spike POST_SPIKE_WINDOW=20 ticks uncommitted-step count + n_decommit_transitions). Pre-registered 8-criterion gate: C1-C5 replicate V3-EXQ-126 signal gates (delta_var_unexpected>=0.005, delta_var_expected<0.002, ablated baseline<0.002, discriminative_delta>=0.004, n_unexpected>=10); C6 NEW behavioural ratio gate (ON n_decommit / max(1, ABL n_decommit) >= 2.0 + ON floor>=1); C7 NEW post-spike uncommitted lift (ON mean / max(1.0, ABL) >= 1.5 + ON floor>=1.0); C8 no fatal errors. PASS = all 8. claim_ids=[MECH-104] only per CLAIM_IDS Accuracy Rule (NOT MECH-090: R-c gates OFF; NOT ARC-016: precision-to-commitment circuit not under test; NOT Q-007: orthogonal). 4-row interpretation grid in script docstring: ALL_PASS -> supports MECH-104 + closes conflict_ratio gap; C1-C5 PASS C6/C7 FAIL -> weakens 'enables de-commitment' half, route to /failure-autopsy + R-c-gates-ON successor; C1-C4 FAIL C6/C7 PASS -> /diagnose-errors on measurement window; ALL FAIL -> /diagnose-errors on substrate/env drift. supersedes V3-EXQ-126. Dry-run smoke PASS 2026-06-01T07:07Z (substrate-side end-to-end run; C1-C4 PASS at dry-run scale confirming signal-magnitude path, C5/C6/C7 FAIL only due to insufficient dry-run sample size which is expected; emit_outcome sentinel written; validate_experiments AST OK). Estimated time: 2 seeds x (400 warmup + 50 eval x 2 conditions) on Mac ~0.10 min/ep at 200 steps/ep -> ~100 min full-scale + 20% margin = 120 min. HAZARD NOTED (V3-EXQ-603d incident 2026-06-01T06:46Z): phase3-queue sync_daemon snapshot writer can drop pathspec-staged files between git-add and git-commit; post-commit dropped-file check verifies V3-EXQ-623 lands cleanly. Concurrent active sibling at queue time: implement-substrate-mech-341 V3-EXQ-614c (disjoint queue_id + script filename).

items.title: ARC-068 / MECH-320 Niv-vs-Salamone opportunity-cost-vs-effort-cost dissociation
items.note: ARC-068 (action.opportunity_cost_no_op_penalty) Niv-vs-Salamone discriminative test on MECH-320 w_passive implementation. EXP-0081 / EVB-0237 dispatch_mode=discriminative_pair. ARC-068 lit-pull R3 verdict 2026-05-16 preserves slot-level registration; implementation collapses into MECH-320. R4 verdict: ARC-068 must NOT collapse into MECH-258 / SD-032b dacc_effort_cost (Salamone & Correa 2003 dissociation). 4-arm design: ARM_0 baseline / ARM_1 vigor + Niv env / ARM_2 vigor + Salamone elevated-movement-cost env / ARM_3 baseline + Salamone env. Forced-vigor probe v_t_floor=0.05 implements V3-EXQ-549 prescribed fix (substrate fired correctly under V3-EXQ-547 readiness but EWMA path stuck at zero under default env config in 549; 549 reclassified non_contributory and routed forced-vigor follow-on). Pre-registered acceptance C1 Niv lift >= 0.03, C2 dissociation < 0.50, C3 gate_product >= 0.5, C4 informative-only no-op penalty. claim_ids=[MECH-320, ARC-068] with evidence_direction_per_claim. MECH-258 / SD-032b are foils dissociated from, NOT tested directly. 4-row interpretation grid in script docstring: PASS = ARC-068 supports; C2 FAIL = ARC-068 weakens (effort-cost collapse, surface supersession question to /governance); C1 FAIL + C3 PASS = /failure-autopsy; C3 FAIL = /diagnose-errors. Phase3-queue snapshot race hazard mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md (post-commit dropped-file check).
